zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Burrough於1533年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特時，她的父親John Burrough23歲，母親Margaret Bourne29歲。她於1550年與Nicholas Hedge結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年4月在她的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Burrough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Burrough was born in 1533, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Burrough, was 23 and her mother, Margaret Bourne, was 29. She married Nicholas Hedge in 1550. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in April 1577, in her hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Burrough est née en 1533, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Burrough, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bourne, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Hedge en 1550. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1577, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Burrough 1533 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Burrough 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bourne 29. Sie hat 1550 Nicholas Hedge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1577 im Alter von 44 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Burrough è nata il nel 1533 nel East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Burrough, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bourne, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Hedge nel 1550. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1577, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Burroughが1533年にイギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトで生まれた時，父John Burroughは23歳，母Margaret Bourneは29歳であった。1550年にNicholas Hedgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年4月に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Burrough(이)가 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Burrough(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bourne(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1550년 Nicholas Hedge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 4월 그녀의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이스트 버고트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Burrough родилась в 1533 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Burrough было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bourne, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Hedge в 1550 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1577 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
